creator: jamiefinnigan@gmail.com
text: In talking with a mod_auth_openidc team member (https://github.com/pingidentity/mod_auth_openidc/issues/169), they're planning on doing a 2.0.0 final release in the near future.  I'm withdrawing this submission based on a release-candidate version for now, and will resubmit when the final release occurs.
